description_long: This is a white Ford Crown Victoria-style police car with blue NYPD markings and a prominent number '2864' on the roof and rear. The vehicle features a blue stripe running along both sides, with 'NYPD' and additional text in blue on the front doors. The car is equipped with a roof-mounted light bar containing red and blue emergency lights, as well as additional smaller lights. The windows are tinted black, and the wheels are solid black. The rear of the car displays a license plate and the number '2864' in large blue digits. The overall appearance is typical of a New York City police patrol car, designed for urban law enforcement.
description: A white NYPD police car with blue stripes, roof-mounted emergency lights, and large '2864' markings on the roof and rear. It features tinted windows, black wheels, and detailed law enforcement identifiers.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the blue NYPD logo, blue side stripe, and rear lights.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the black windshield, roof light bar, and 'POLICE' text on the hood.
description_view_2: Right side view with NYPD markings, blue stripe, and visible front and rear doors.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the large '2864' number, license plate, and rear lights.
attribute_police_markings: Blue 'NYPD' text on both front doors, blue horizontal stripes along both sides, large blue '2864' on the roof and rear, 'POLICE' text on the hood, and additional small blue text on the doors. All markings are in a bold, sans-serif font.
attribute_emergency_lights: Roof-mounted light bar with red and blue lights arranged in a rectangular housing, plus additional smaller lights on the roof.
attribute_license_plate: Present on the rear, white with blue text, displaying '2864' and additional smaller text.
